summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that BC is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $79.45. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 71.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $85.29 and a significant trendline confluence around $83.08 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
